title: phaseoloides fruticosum
intro: Phaseoloides fruticosum, also known as the shrub bean or climbing bean, is a type of climbing plant in the legume family native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Phaseoloides fruticosum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin infections and wounds, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Phaseoloides fruticosum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its dried roots and leaves can be used to make herbal remedies for various health conditions.
